variables.input:
data record(event="PEX-PRD Container Restart for POD - pex-ms-investigation-2-59dbdb496-bnk62"),
record(event="PEX-PRD Container Restart for POD - pex-ms-fraud-api-1-68f8fdc975-t6m8r"),
record(event="PEX-PRD Container Restart for POD - pex-ms-fraud-api-1-68f8fdc975-t6m8r")
| summarize events=collectDistinct(event)

7.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter event.category=="AVAILABILITY"
| makeTimeseries count=count()//, by:{event.category}
| fieldsAdd total=arraySum(count)

8.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter event.category=="ERROR"
| makeTimeseries count=count()//, by:{event.category}
| fieldsAdd total=arraySum(count)

9.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter event.category=="RESOURCE_CONTENTION"
| makeTimeseries count=count()//, by:{event.category}
| fieldsAdd total=arraySum(count)

10.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter event.category=="CUSTOM_ALERT"
| makeTimeseries count=count()//, by:{event.category}
| fieldsAdd total=arraySum(count)

11.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter event.category=="SLOWDOWN"
| makeTimeseries count=count()
| fieldsAdd total=arraySum(count)

14.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| makeTimeseries {root_cause=countIf(isNotNull(root_cause_entity_id)or in(event.name, $root_cause_exempt)), total=count()}, interval:7d
| fieldsAdd root_cause.total=arraySum(root_cause), problems.total=arraySum(total), root_cause_percent= 100*root_cause[]/total[]
| fieldsAdd root_cause_percent.total=100*root_cause.total/problems.total

16.title: Top $tagKey for [$eventName] Problem
16.description: Copy the exact event.name from the "Top Problems" table and paste in the eventName variable. Top $tagKey for that event.name will populate here.
16.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter contains(event.name,$eventName, caseSensitive:false)
| expand entity_tags
| filter startsWith(entity_tags, "$tagKey:noquote:")
| parse entity_tags, "'$tagKey:noquote:' LD:$tagKey:noquote"
| makeTimeseries problems=count(), by:{$tagKey:noquote}, interval: 24h
| fieldsAdd problems.total=arraySum(problems)
| sort problems.total desc

20.title: Problem types & root cause % by $tagKey
20.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| expand entity_tags
| filter startsWith(entity_tags, "$tagKey:noquote:")
| parse entity_tags, "'$tagKey:noquote:' LD:$tagKey:noquote"
| summarize {
  availability=countIf(event.category=="AVAILABILITY"),
  availability.rc=countIf(event.category=="AVAILABILITY" AND isNotNull(root_cause_entity_id)),
  error=countIf(event.category=="ERROR"),
  error.rc=countIf(event.category=="ERROR" AND isNotNull(root_cause_entity_id)),
  slowdown=countIf(event.category=="SLOWDOWN"),
  slowdown.rc=countIf(event.category=="SLOWDOWN" AND isNotNull(root_cause_entity_id)),
  resource=countIf(event.category=="RESOURCE_CONTENTION"),
  resource.rc=countIf(event.category=="RESOURCE_CONTENTION" AND isNotNull(root_cause_entity_id)),
  custom=countIf(event.category=="CUSTOM_ALERT"),
  custom.rc=countIf(event.category=="CUSTOM_ALERT" AND isNotNull(root_cause_entity_id)),
  total=count(),
  total.rc=countIf(isNotNull(root_cause_entity_id))
  
},by:{$tagKey:noquote}
| fieldsAdd availability.rc.p= 100*availability.rc/availability,
  error.rc.p=100*error.rc/error,
  slowdown.rc.p=100*slowdown.rc/slowdown,
  resource.rc.p=100*resource.rc/resource,
  custom.rc.p=100*custom.rc/custom,
  total.rc.p=100*total.rc/total,
  root_cause=100*total.rc/total
| sort total desc

22.description: Average duration per problem when a root cause is automatically identified
22.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter isNotNull(root_cause_entity_id)
| summarize rc.mttr=avg(resolved_problem_duration)

24.description: Average duration per problem when a root cause is not automatically identified
24.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter isNull(root_cause_entity_id)
| summarize mttr=avg(resolved_problem_duration)

27.title: Resource Capacity Savings
27.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter isNull(root_cause_entity_id)
| summarize {non.rc.total=count(), non.rc.mttr=avg(resolved_problem_duration)}, by:{event.category}
| join [
  fetch dt.davis.problems
  | filter isNotNull(root_cause_entity_id)
  | summarize {total=count(), mttr=avg(resolved_problem_duration)}, by:{event.category}
  | append [data record(event.category="CUSTOM_ALERT",total=0,mttr=null)]
], on:{event.category}, prefix:"rc."//, kind:outer
| fieldsAdd total_problems= non.rc.total+rc.total, rc.percent=100*rc.total/(non.rc.total+rc.total), resource_capacity_savings=asLong(rc.total)*toLong($effort_saved_rc_Mins)*toLong($resource_hour_value)/60
| sort total_problems desc
| summarize value=sum(resource_capacity_savings)

29.title: Digital Disruption Avoided
29.description: (MTTR w no RC - MTTR w RC) * # of problems RC
29.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter isNull(root_cause_entity_id)
| filterOut event.category=="CUSTOM_ALERT"
| summarize {non.rc.total=count(), non.rc.mttr=avg(resolved_problem_duration)}
| fieldsAdd join="join"
| join [
  fetch dt.davis.problems
  | filter isNotNull(root_cause_entity_id)
  | summarize {total=count(), mttr=avg(resolved_problem_duration)}
  | fieldsAdd join="join"
], on:{join}, prefix:"rc."//, kind:outer
| fieldsAdd total_problems= non.rc.total+rc.total, rc.time.saved=(non.rc.mttr-rc.mttr)
| fieldsAdd digital_disruption_avoided=rc.time.saved*rc.total
//| fields digital_disruption_avoided=if(digital_disruption_avoided > 0, digital_disruption_avoided, else: 0)

56.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| makeTimeseries {root_cause=countIf(isNotNull(root_cause_entity_id)or in(event.name, $root_cause_exempt)), total=count()}, interval:7d
| fieldsAdd root_cause.total=arraySum(root_cause), problems.total=arraySum(total), root_cause_percent= 100*root_cause[]/total[]
| fieldsAdd root_cause_percent.total=100*root_cause.total/problems.total, join="join"
| join [
  fetch dt.davis.problems, from: -60d, to: -30d
  | makeTimeseries {root_cause=countIf(isNotNull(root_cause_entity_id)or in(event.name, $root_cause_exempt)), total=count()}, interval:7d
  | fieldsAdd root_cause.total=arraySum(root_cause), problems.total=arraySum(total), root_cause_percent= 100*root_cause[]/total[]
  | fieldsAdd root_cause_percent.total=100*root_cause.total/problems.total, join="join"
], on:join, prefix:"previous."
| fields change = root_cause_percent.total - previous.root_cause_percent.total
//| fieldsAdd trend = if(change > 0, "⬆️"️, else: "⬇️")
| fieldsAdd trend = if(change > 0, "⬆️", else: "⬇️")

57.title: Previous 30d
57.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems, from: -60d, to: -30d
| makeTimeseries {root_cause=countIf(isNotNull(root_cause_entity_id)or in(event.name, $root_cause_exempt)), total=count()}, interval:7d
| fieldsAdd root_cause.total=arraySum(root_cause), problems.total=arraySum(total), root_cause_percent= 100*root_cause[]/total[]
| fieldsAdd root_cause_percent.total=100*root_cause.total/problems.total

58.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter isNotNull(root_cause_entity_id)
| filterOut event.category=="CUSTOM_ALERT"
| summarize rc.mttr=avg(resolved_problem_duration)
| fieldsAdd join="join"
| join [
  fetch dt.davis.problems
  | filter isNull(root_cause_entity_id)
  | filterOut event.category=="CUSTOM_ALERT"
  | summarize mttr=avg(resolved_problem_duration)
  | fieldsAdd join="join"
], on: {join}, prefix:"no.rc."
| fieldsAdd rc=no.rc.mttr/rc.mttr

singleValue.label: Anomaly Duration with auto-identified root cause

58.description: Resolution Time on anomalies with Auto identified Root Cause vs. without (on Non Custom Alert Problems)
